header.note: Mechanics only: post-revoke branches rejected (UnauthorizedAuthor), pre-revoke history retained. Derived from real backfill_import.

vectors.label: post-revocation: author lost standing -> subsequent branch rejected

deferred_authority_note: The revoke-AUTHORITY threshold sub-case (a removal op MUST carry signatures meeting the genesis threshold, lineage-counted, or be rejected) is now emitted as REAL vectors in revocation-authority.json — it exercises the green-real gov::meets_threshold_by_lineage. What remains Workstream C is ONLY over-the-wire authority distribution + the co-sign-vs-vote ordering (open-edges.md §1).
